title: WebFinger and NodeInfo endpoints
description: GET /.well-known/webfinger — resolve acct:user@domain queries, return JSON with links to actor document. GET /.well-known/nodeinfo — discovery document pointing to /nodeinfo/2.0. GET /nodeinfo/2.0 — NodeInfo 2.0 document (software name/version, protocols: activitypub, usage stats). Use fieldwork::webfinger and fieldwork::nodeinfo builders. Return 404 for unknown accounts.
close_reason: Post creation, WebFinger/NodeInfo, actor/outbox/followers endpoints all implemented and smoke-tested
